lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has minor scratches and some paint fading. The interior shows noticeable wear on the upholstery. Mechanical components are currently functional.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition, serving as a reliable choice for a buyer who prioritizes mechanical functionality over cosmetic perfection. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scuffs on the front and rear bumpers, along with some minor paint chips and thinning clear coat on the hood. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows clear signs of use, including some wear on the driver's seat bolster and minor staining on the rear carpets. Mechanically, the car starts and runs dependably, though it will likely require routine maintenance like new brake pads in the near future. All essential electronics, including the air conditioning and infotainment system, are in working order. This is a practical, honest vehicle that is priced to reflect its current cosmetic state while still offering many miles of service.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project seekers! If you're looking for a vehicle with lots of potential at a rock-bottom price, this is the one for you. While it requires significant mechanical attention and shows heavy wear inside and out, it's a fantastic opportunity for someone handy to roll up their sleeves and get to work.
This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it does show its age and usage. The exterior has several noticeable scratches

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver. Offering a seamless blend of performance and reliability, it has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. A distinguished choice for those who demand excellence and long-term value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend trips. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner who will appreciate it just as much as I have. Perfect for anyone looking for a dependable, stylish ride that still has plenty of life left!

This driver-focused icon features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains taut with a subframe reinforcement kit already installed, while power is managed by a crisp 6-speed manual and a factory M-variable differential lock. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS service and valve adjustment to ensure peak volumetric efficiency. Riding on a staggered setup with ventilated rotors, this specimen offers exceptional turn-in response and braking modulation. It is a mechanically robust example of precision engineering, ready for the apex.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable engine. Ready for sale.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of performance and comfort, showing clear signs of pride of ownership. The exterior presents beautifully with a vibrant finish, while the interior remains clean and inviting, featuring well-preserved seating and a fully functional dashboard. Under the hood, the car runs smoothly thanks to a consistent maintenance schedule, including a recent comprehensive service and fluid flush. It handles with precision and provides a quiet, reliable ride that feels solid on the road. From the responsive infotainment system to the effective climate control, every feature works as intended. This is a dependable, high-quality choice for a discerning buyer looking for a vehicle that has been cared for properly and is ready for its next chapter.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and sophisticated engineering. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic excellence. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, it offers an optimal balance of value and prestige for the discerning driver.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking an optimal balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and presented in commendable condition, it features a comprehensive service history and remains mechanically sound. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to quality, offering a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional value within its class.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable car that's been such a joy to drive. It's in really nice shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a dependable ride that still looks great on the road. I've taken good care of it, and it's ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home!

This E46 M3 features the iconic S54 inline-six, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies and a precision-engineered Getrag 420G manual transmission. The chassis remains composed thanks to a limited-slip variable M differential and refreshed bushings. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and subframe reinforcement, ensuring the structural integrity of the rear floor pan. The suspension geometry provides exceptional turn-in crispness, while the high-revving valvetrain offers a visceral linear power band up to the 8,000 RPM redline. A mechanically sound example for the discerning driver looking for a pure analog experience.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Minor cosmetic wear. Service records included.

Offering a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday reliability. This car presents in impressive condition, featuring a clean, smoke-free interior with well-preserved upholstery and fully functional electronics throughout the cabin. Mechanically, the vehicle is robust; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension remains tight and responsive. The exterior paint retains a deep gloss, showing only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Recently serviced with a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this car is turn-key and ready for its next owner. It represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a high-quality, dependable ride without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and performance. This specimen has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a balanced combination of luxury and durability, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver who values consistency and quality. Acquire this exceptional vehicle today and experience automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this model offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. It remains a premier choice for those seeking a sophisticated driving experience at a competitive valuation.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so you can count on it for all your upcoming adventures! Everything runs smoothly and it’s looking great—perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that's ready to hit the road today. Come take it for a spin, you’re going to love how it handles!
This 997.1 Carrera S is a driver-focused example featuring the M97.01 3.8L flat-six
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained engine. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep luster, showing only minor signs of careful use consistent with its age, such as small stone chips on the front bumper. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free, pristine cabin with supple seating, intact trim, and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, it is in excellent shape; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and it has been serviced regularly with a full maintenance history available. With a clean title and a history of responsible ownership, this car is ready to provide its next driver with many miles of reliable enjoyment. It’s a solid, honest vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. This unit exhibits a consistent history of mechanical stewardship and remains in commendable aesthetic condition. Engineered for reliability and performance, it offers a sophisticated driving experience that aligns with our dealership's rigorous standards for quality and value.

Thoroughly inspected to ensure operational reliability, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver who demands both sophistication and dependability.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road? I'm parting with my trusty car, and it's been such a joy to drive! It’s in solid shape, super dependable, and ready for all your weekend adventures. It's been well-loved and is just waiting for someone new to take the wheel. Come see it for yourself—you're going to love how it handles!

Offering a mechanically sound 996 Carrera 4S featuring the robust 3.6L flat-six with documented IMS bearing retrofit and RMS replacement. Power is delivered via a precise 6-speed manual to an all-wheel-drive system utilizing a viscous coupling. The chassis remains taut with Bilstein B8 dampers and refreshed control arm bushings, ensuring communicative steering and high lateral grip. Braking is handled by factory four-piston monobloc calipers over cross-drilled rotors. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with a well-loved
Used car. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Minor exterior wear. Runs well.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday utility. The exterior finish retains a high-gloss shine, showing only minor, expected stone chips consistent with careful road use. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free, professionally detailed cabin featuring premium materials with minimal signs of wear on the bolsters. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; the engine runs quiet and strong, the suspension remains firm, and the gear transitions are seamless. It has been serviced regularly at scheduled intervals, with a recent multi-point inspection and oil change just completed. This is a reliable, turn-key car that has been cared for by a meticulous owner and is ready for its next chapter.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, balancing robust performance with exceptional value.
